isi.lyrics:
Lyric cosmosy - end=and

Romanization

Through endless nights, we wandered beneath a sky
that remembered every dream we ever dared to hold.

The stars whispered that even in the silence,
a new song was waiting to be born.

Every farewell was a bridge,
every shadow a quiet guide toward the light.

Awakening begins from end to and, we are cosmosy.

Hangeul

Through endless nights, we wandered beneath a sky
that remembered every dream we ever dared to hold.

The stars whispered that even in the silence,
a new song was waiting to be born.

Every farewell was a bridge,
every shadow a quiet guide toward the light.

Awakening begins from end to and, we are cosmosy.
isi.lyrics_timestamp:
Through endless nights, we wandered beneath a sky 
that remembered every dream we ever dared to hold.

The stars whispered that even in the silence, 
a new song was waiting to be born.

Every farewell was a bridge, 
every shadow a quiet guide toward the light.

Awakening begins from end to and, we are cosmosy.

isi.lyrics:
Lyric cosmosy - Princess=Kiss

Romanization

Princess kiss is what I need is princess kiss is what I need is
Princess kiss is what I need is princess kiss is what I need

ガラスの欠片に itdeon nareul
dalbit arae ulgiman haetdeon 私
Kiss haejwoyo ki kiss して now
そしたら今すぐ解いて

積極的、トキトキメキ
ふわりはばたき、ぴかりひらめき
I wanna chokchokhage I wanna dalkomhage
nan wonhae our lips are shining light

キスしたら終わりだよ
終わりからの始まり
Just one kiss, to the a(e)nd yeah
majimagi anin sijak

Fizzy glossy oh my lips on fire

neomu joaseo 泣いちゃいそう

meomchujineun ma yeongwonhi gieokdoel i sunggan

isi.lyrics:
Lyric cosmosy - HIGH=LOVE

Romanization

I crash my heart for you
遠ざかる純愛の星
見えない星座
‘saranghae’ geu mareun mideul suga eopseo
‘Go away’ honjaseo sangcheoppunin my heart

Let’s get to the new world saeroun segyero
あれ×これは singgyeong sseuji ma
Let’s get to the new world 新たな世界へ
eoseo gaboja eoseo ppalli gaboja

HIGH=LOVE 最強のアプリ
(新発売)
I × 愛しかない sinsegye
(Never ending love)
逃げよう、ダウンロード and install
Kill it kill it 最愛、we won’t let you down

deo isang honjaga aniya gogaereul deureo
meomchul su eopseo 無限 matching love
愛と正義の cosmosy on the way
Kill it 最愛、we won’t let you down

隠してても、誤魔化しても
満たされない、so トリプル無理 like
heomuhae geuriwo oerowo pogihallae nan
I can’t be that girl like you

嘘の瞳に騙されていた
私 out of time
Baby I’m so stupid oh
もう嫌、馬鹿 gateunggeol
babo みたいな私

I can’t let go
meoreojineun naui moksorireul follow してね
歌いたい
Hear my voice and heart
So 目覚めて jigeum

Let’s get to the new world saeroun segyero
あれ×これは singgyeong sseuji ma
Let’s get to the new world 新たな世界へ
eoseo gaboja eoseo ppalli gaboja

(新発売)
I × 愛しかない sinsegye
逃げよう、ダウンロード and install
Kill it kill it 最愛、we won’t let you down

deo isang honjaga aniya gogaereul deureo
meomchul su eopseo 無限 matching love
愛と正義の cosmosy on the way
Kill it 最愛、we won’t let you down

i maeumeul 伝えたくて
malhal su eomneun nae bimiriya
baro nuneul tteo neoui moksori chajabwa

心を jeonhago sipeoseo
jigeum dasi neoreul mannagopa
目を覚まして
声を聴かせて
Kill it kill it 最愛、we won’t let you down

Hangeul

I crash my heart for you
遠ざかる純愛の星
見えない星座
‘사랑해’ 그 말은 믿을 수가 없어
‘Go away’ 혼자서 상처뿐인 my heart

あれ×これは 신경 쓰지 마
